title: Tea Time in the Garden
synopsis: Grandmother serves afternoon tea in a quiet garden behind her house.
sentences: On Sunday afternoon, Ella visited her grandmother's house in a small English town.
The weather was warm, so they carried a tray into the back garden.
Her grandmother poured tea into thin cups with tiny blue flowers on them.
There were also scones, strawberry jam, and a bowl of cream.
Ella liked to spread the jam slowly so it reached every corner of the bread.
Bees moved from flower to flower while the two of them sat in the sun.
Her grandmother told stories about when she was a girl and played in the same garden.
A cat slept under the table and did not wake even when a bird landed nearby.
Ella asked if tea always tasted better outside.
Her grandmother said yes, especially when there was time to sit and talk.
When the cups were empty, they stayed in their chairs for a while longer.
The garden felt peaceful, and Ella wished the afternoon would not end.
